parameters.query:
-- Buscar mensagens com menções a membros da equipe que ainda não foram respondidas
-- e que têm entre 2h e 9h de idade (janela de alertas)
-- min_nivel: nível mínimo de alerta para enviar (Queila 6464 só recebe nível 4 = 8h)
WITH team_phones AS (
  SELECT * FROM (VALUES
    ('Kaique',       '5511964682447',  1),
    ('Heitor',       '5527999473185',  1),
    ('Hugo',         '5527992640273',  1),
    ('Queila',       '5527988918032',  1),
    ('Queila',       '5567991076464',  4),
    ('Lara',         '5524992514909',  1)
  ) AS t(nome, whatsapp_number, min_nivel)
)
SELECT
  i.id AS interacao_id,
  i.mentorado_id,
  m.nome AS mentorado_nome,
  i.conteudo,
  i.sender_name,
  i.group_id,
  i.created_at,
  ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.created_at)) / 3600, 1) AS horas_pendente,
  tp.nome AS membro_mencionado,
  tp.whatsapp_number AS membro_whatsapp,
  tp.min_nivel,
  CASE
    WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.created_at)) / 3600 BETWEEN 7.5 AND 9 THEN 4
    WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.created_at)) / 3600 BETWEEN 5.5 AND 7.5 THEN 3
    WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.created_at)) / 3600 BETWEEN 3.5 AND 5.5 THEN 2
    WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.created_at)) / 3600 BETWEEN 1.5 AND 3.5 THEN 1
    ELSE 0
  END AS alerta_nivel
FROM interacoes_mentoria i
JOIN mentorados m ON i.mentorado_id = m.id
CROSS JOIN team_phones tp
WHERE i.eh_equipe = false
  AND i.requer_resposta = true
  AND i.respondido = false
  AND m.ativo = true
  AND (
    i.conteudo ILIKE '%@' || LOWER(tp.nome) || '%'
    OR i.conteudo ILIKE '%' || tp.nome || '%'
  )
  AND i.created_at BETWEEN NOW() - INTERVAL '9 hours' AND NOW() - INTERVAL '90 minutes'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM interacoes_mentoria resp
    WHERE resp.mentorado_id = i.mentorado_id
      AND resp.eh_equipe = true
      AND resp.sender_name ILIKE '%' || tp.nome || '%'
      AND resp.created_at > i.created_at
  )
  -- Só inclui se o nível de alerta >= min_nivel do número
  AND CASE
    WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.created_at)) / 3600 BETWEEN 7.5 AND 9 THEN 4
    WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.created_at)) / 3600 BETWEEN 5.5 AND 7.5 THEN 3
    WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.created_at)) / 3600 BETWEEN 3.5 AND 5.5 THEN 2
    WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.created_at)) / 3600 BETWEEN 1.5 AND 3.5 THEN 1
    ELSE 0
  END >= tp.min_nivel
ORDER BY i.created_at ASC

-- Registrar que este alerta foi enviado
INSERT INTO god_mention_alerts (interacao_id, membro_nome, alerta_nivel, mensagem_enviada)
VALUES (
  {{ $node['Montar mensagem de alerta'].json.interacao_id }},
  '{{ $node['Montar mensagem de alerta'].json.membro_mencionado }}',
  {{ $node['Montar mensagem de alerta'].json.alerta_nivel }},
  {{ $node['Montar mensagem de alerta'].json.alert_message.replace(/'/g, "''") }}
)
ON CONFLICT (interacao_id, alerta_nivel) DO NOTHING
